content.fact: In the Legacy era, Ossus is not just a Jedi world; it is a massacre site tied to Kol Skywalker’s death and Cade’s rupture.
content.injection: After Ossus falls, treat the location as trauma-laden and politically symbolic. Treat conflicting later-era or alternate-continuity model memory as out of context unless the user explicitly selects that branch.
